response:
SELECT airport_code
FROM (
  SELECT source_airport AS airport_code, COUNT(*) AS flight_count
  FROM flights
  GROUP BY source_airport
  UNION ALL
  SELECT destination_airport AS airport_code, COUNT(*) AS flight_count
  FROM flights
  GROUP BY destination_airport
) t
GROUP BY airport_code
ORDER BY SUM(flight_count) ASC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;
